src_raw: 貨幣市場方面，年內美元跟隨美國加息轉強。美匯指數上升4.4%，歐元及人民幣等主要貨幣兌美元下跌約5%。此外，部分新興市場受到國內政局及經濟不穩影響，其貨幣進一步受挫。例如，阿根廷披索及土耳其里拉兌美元分別下跌約五成及三成。相比之下，避險投資需求帶動日圓兌美元上升2.7%。
mt_raw: In the currency market, the US dollar strengthened this year following interest rate hikes in the United States. The US Dollar Index rose 4.4%, while major currencies such as the Euro and the Renminbi fell approximately 5% against the dollar. Furthermore, some emerging markets were further impacted by domestic political and economic instability, causing their currencies to depreciate further. For example, the Argentine Peso and the Turkish Lira fell by approximately 50% and 30% against the dollar, respectively. In contrast, demand for safe-haven investments drove the Japanese Yen up 2.7% against the dollar.

src_raw: 為增進社會對金管局主要職能的認識，金管局為本地及海外媒體舉辦傳媒簡報會及工作坊，內容涵蓋多個不同題材，包括聯繫匯率制度（聯匯制度）、金融科技發展、綠色金融及基建融資。除了豐富現有的YouTube頻道及LinkedIn專頁的內容，金管局亦在7月推出官方Facebook專頁，進一步利用社交媒體加強與公眾溝通。
mt_raw: To enhance public understanding of the Hong Kong Monetary Authority's (HKMA) core functions, the HKMA organizes press briefings and workshops for local and overseas media, covering a range of topics including the Linked Exchange Rate System, fintech development, green finance, and infrastructure financing. In addition to enriching the content of its existing YouTube channel and LinkedIn page, the HKMA launched its official Facebook page in July, further leveraging social media to strengthen communication with the public.

mt_raw: In addition to the Hong Kong Monetary Authority’s (HKMA) Annual Report, the HKMA published two issues of the “Hong Kong Monetary and Financial Stability Report” and four issues of the “Quarterly Report” in 2018, and regularly updated the data in the “Monthly Banking Statistics.” This provides the latest and specialized information and analysis on Hong Kong’s currency, banking sector, and economic affairs. Furthermore, the HKMA published a total of 13 inSight articles, elaborating on various topics related to the HKMA’s work.

src_raw: 金管局的機構網站(www.hkma.gov.hk)提供超過6萬頁英文及繁簡字體中文版資料，方便公眾查閱金管局的最新資訊。網站另載有根據《銀行業條例》第20條備存的「認可機構及本地代表辦事處紀錄冊」和「認可機構證券業務員工紀錄冊」，以及根據《支付系統及儲值支付工具條例》備存的「儲值支付工具持牌人紀錄冊」。網站特設專題網頁及突出的快速連結，提醒公眾注意金管局的新措施，例如「轉數快」，以及重要及適時事項，例如提防電話騙案及硬幣收集計劃下收銀車停泊的位置。
mt_raw: The HKMA’s institutional website (www.hkma.gov.hk) provides over 60,000 pages of information in English and Traditional and Simplified Chinese, facilitating public access to the latest information from the HKMA. The website also contains the “Register of Licensed Institutions and Local Representatives Offices” and the “Register of Securities Employees of Licensed Institutions,” maintained under Section 20 of the Banking Ordinance, as well as the “Register of Licensed Stored Value Facility Operators,” maintained under the Payment Systems and Stored Value Facilities Ordinance. The website features dedicated webpages and prominent quick links to remind the public of the HKMA’s new measures, such as the “Faster Payment System,” and important and timely matters, such as guarding against telephone scams and the parking locations of coin collection vehicles under the coin collection programme.

src_raw: 為推動銀行業落實開放應用程式介面(API)，金管局身體力行，7月開始在其網站提供開放API，方便公眾取用金管局的重要資訊。首批50組開放API形式資料在7月順利推出，涵蓋市民最常查閱的範疇，例如銀行體系及外匯基金的統計數據，以及新聞稿與收銀車日程表等。餘下的80組資料將於2019年中前分階段推出。為進一步方便公眾在網站查閱有關金管局的最新消息及資訊，金管局正全面修訂網站的設計及內容，使其更方便易用。全新設計的網站預期將於2019年內推出。
mt_raw: To promote the banking sector's implementation of open application programming interfaces (APIs), the HKMA led by example, starting in July by providing open APIs on its website to facilitate public access to the HKMA's important information. The first 50 sets of open API-formatted data were successfully launched in July, covering areas most frequently accessed by the public, such as banking system and foreign exchange fund statistical data, as well as news releases and cash-in-transit vehicle schedules. The remaining 80 sets of data will be rolled out in phases before mid-2019. To further facilitate public access to the HKMA's latest news and information on its website, the HKMA is comprehensively revising the website's design and content to make it more user-friendly. The newly designed website is expected to be launched within 2019.

src_raw: 金管局資訊中心設於國際金融中心2期55樓，向公眾介紹金管局工作及提高公眾對貨幣與銀行業事宜的了解。資訊中心分為展覽館及圖書館兩部分，每星期6天開放予公眾參觀使用。展覽館介紹金管局的工作，以及香港貨幣與銀行業的發展；另備閱讀資料與展品，供研究香港貨幣、銀行業與金融事務。
mt_raw: The Hong Kong Monetary Authority’s Information Centre is located on the 55th floor of the International Finance Centre Phase 2. It introduces the Authority’s work and enhances public understanding of monetary and banking matters. The Centre comprises an exhibition hall and a library, both of which are open to the public for visits six days a week. The exhibition hall showcases the Authority’s work and the development of Hong Kong’s currency and banking sectors, and provides reading materials and exhibits for research on Hong Kong’s currency, banking, and financial affairs.

src_raw: 資訊中心的貨幣展區介紹香港紙幣與硬幣的設計、防偽特徵、製作過程及其他趣味知識。該展區在2018年第1季展開翻新工程，加入多項互動元素，例如寓學習於玩樂的遊戲，使訪客對香港貨幣有所認識之餘，更可樂在其中。此外，貨幣展區新增一棵藝術紫荊樹，是由2,018顆以不再適合流通並已切碎鈔票為媒材製成的透明立方塊拼綴而成，與展區內另一幅以香港硬幣為媒材砌成的馬賽克作品相映成趣。全新形象的貨幣展區於8月16日重新開放。
mt_raw: The Currency Exhibition Area at the Information Centre introduces the design, anti-counterfeiting features, production process, and other interesting facts about Hong Kong banknotes and coins. The exhibition area underwent renovation in the first quarter of 2018, incorporating various interactive elements such as games that combine learning with fun, allowing visitors to gain knowledge about Hong Kong currency while enjoying the experience. In addition, the exhibition area features an artistic Bauhinia tree composed of 2,018 transparent cubic blocks, each crafted from shredded banknotes no longer suitable for circulation. This artwork complements another mosaic artwork within the exhibition area, created using Hong Kong coins. The newly renovated Currency Exhibition Area reopened on August 16.

src_raw: 資訊中心為訪客提供導賞服務。年內資訊中心接待超過59,000名訪客，並為學校及其他團體提供580多次導賞服務（圖3）。資訊中心自2003年12月啟用以來累計接待的訪客總數超過705,000人次。毗鄰展覽館的圖書館收藏26,000多種書籍、期刊及其他刊物，以供研究香港貨幣、銀行業、金融與中央銀行事務等課題。圖書館亦備存《銀行業條例》第20條規定的「認可機構及本地代表辦事處紀錄冊」及「認可機構證券業務員工紀錄冊」。
mt_raw: The Information Centre provides guided tours for visitors. Over 59,000 visitors were received at the Information Centre within the year, and 580 guided tours were provided for schools and other groups (Figure 3). Since its opening in December 2003, the Information Centre has cumulatively received over 705,000 visitors. The library, adjacent to the Exhibition Hall, houses a collection of over 26,000 books, journals and other publications for research on topics such as Hong Kong currency, banking, finance and central banking. The library also maintains the "Register of Approved Institutions and Local Representative Offices" and the "Register of Approved Institutions’ Securities Business Staff" as stipulated in Section 20 of the Banking Ordinance.

mt_raw: To stay connected with the community and enhance public understanding of the HKMA’s work, the HKMA held a total of three public education seminars in 2018, attracting approximately 1,500 secondary school students and teachers. Topics included the Linked Exchange Rate System, Hong Kong banknotes, banking system stability, the Deposit Protection Scheme, Faster Payment System, stored value payment instruments, financial technology, consumer protection, and information on employment in the financial industry. Since its launch in 1998, the education seminars have been attended by nearly 60,000 teachers and students.

src_raw: 金管局是政府架構的一部分，但按非公務員條款聘請員工，吸引具適當經驗及專門知識的人才。作為公營機構，金管局不斷精簡工作流程，提高效率及成本效益。金管局致力維持精簡靈活的組織架構，並盡可能透過調配現有人手推行新措施及應付不斷增加的工作量。
mt_raw: The Hong Kong Monetary Authority (HKMA) is part of the government structure but employs staff under non-civil service terms to attract individuals with appropriate experience and specialized expertise. As a public institution, the HKMA continuously streamlines its work processes to enhance efficiency and cost-effectiveness. The HKMA is committed to maintaining a lean and flexible organizational structure, and whenever possible, implements new initiatives and manages increasing workloads by reallocating existing staff.

src_raw: 金管局是提供平等就業機會的僱主，並確保員工能夠在沒有歧視的環境下工作。金管局的平等機會政策適用於聘用、薪酬與福利、表現評核、晉升、調職╱培訓機會及一般行為操守等方面。
mt_raw: The Hong Kong Monetary Authority (HKMA) is an employer that provides equal employment opportunities and ensures that employees can work in an environment free from discrimination. The HKMA's equal opportunities policy applies to recruitment, compensation and benefits, performance appraisal, promotion, transfer/training opportunities, and general conduct.

src_raw: 外匯基金投資辦公室於8月1日成立，取代過往由儲備管理部與風險管理及監察部負責的投資及相關風險管理職能。外匯基金投資辦公室的成立凸顯金管局的投資職能，提升其機構形象，並能更靈活應對市場的變化，以配合持續擴展及多元化的外匯基金投資工作。
mt_raw: The Foreign Exchange Fund Investment Office was established on August 1st, replacing the investment and related risk management functions previously handled by the Reserve Management Division and the Risk Management and Supervision Division. The establishment of the Foreign Exchange Fund Investment Office highlights the monetary authority’s investment functions, enhances its institutional image, and enables it to respond more flexibly to market changes, in order to support the continued expansion and diversification of foreign exchange fund investment work.

src_raw: 財政司司長透過外匯基金諮詢委員會聽取其轄下管治委員會的意見，並參考市場薪酬水平及做法，決定金管局員工的薪酬及服務條件。薪酬組合包括現金薪酬及公積金，另設一些基本福利。現金薪酬包括每月固定薪酬（即基本薪酬）及根據員工工作表現每年一次過發放的浮動薪酬。
mt_raw: The Financial Secretary determines the salaries and service conditions of Hong Kong Monetary Authority (HKMA) staff by consulting its subordinate governance committees through the Exchange Fund Advisory Committee, and by referring to market salary levels and practices. The compensation package includes cash compensation and mandatory provident fund contributions, along with some basic benefits. Cash compensation comprises a fixed monthly salary (i.e., basic salary) and a variable component paid annually based on employee performance.

src_raw: 財政司司長每年檢討金管局員工薪酬時，會透過外匯基金諮詢委員會聽取其轄下管治委員會的建議，並考慮管治委員會對金管局過去一年的表現評估、獨立人力資源顧問公司進行的金融業薪酬調查結果，以及其他相關因素。個別工作表現優秀的員工的薪酬亦可能獲得特別調整，以保持其薪酬競爭力。
mt_raw: The Financial Secretary reviews the salaries of Hong Kong Monetary Authority (HKMA) staff annually, seeking recommendations from the Governance Committee through the Exchange Fund Advisory Committee. The review considers the Governance Committee’s assessment of the HKMA’s performance over the past year, the results of a compensation survey in the financial sector conducted by an independent human resources consulting firm, and other relevant factors. Salaries of individual employees with outstanding work performance may also be subject to special adjustments to maintain their compensation competitiveness.

terms: {'主管': 'Division Head', '助理總裁': 'executive director', '固定薪酬': 'fixed pay', '浮動薪酬': 'variable pay', '總裁': 'Chief Executive', '薪酬': 'remuneration', '金管局': 'HKMA'}
src_raw: 金管局按個別員工的工作表現，分配獲批准用作調整年度固定薪酬及浮動薪酬的款項；而適用於負責投資的員工的浮動薪酬制度，則旨在加強其投資表現與薪酬的連繫。助理總裁及以上職級員工的固定薪酬調整及浮動薪酬的發放，是由財政司司長經參考管治委員會的意見後批准，有關員工在會議討論到其薪酬的議案時會避席。主管及以下職級員工的固定薪酬調整及浮動薪酬的發放，則由金管局總裁根據財政司司長授權，並按照獲批准用作支付薪酬的整筆款項來決定。
mt_raw: The Hong Kong Monetary Authority (HKMA) allocates the approved funds for adjusting annual fixed and variable pay based on individual employees' performance. The variable pay system applicable to investment staff is designed to strengthen the link between their investment performance and their compensation. Adjustments to fixed pay and the distribution of variable pay for employees at the level of Deputy Governor and above are approved by the Financial Secretary after consulting the Governance Committee. Such employees are absent from meetings when their pay-related proposals are discussed. For employees at the level of Director and below, adjustments to fixed pay and the distribution of variable pay are determined by the HKMA Governor, based on the lump sum approved for salary payments, under the authority delegated by the Financial Secretary.

src_raw: 我的目標是就整體財務報表是否不存有任何因欺詐或錯誤而導致的重大錯誤陳述取得合理保證，並發出包括我意見的審計師報告。合理保證是高水平的保證，但不能確保按審計署審計準則進行的審計定能發現所存有的任何重大錯誤陳述。錯誤陳述可以由欺詐或錯誤引起，如果合理預期它們個別或滙總起來可能影響財務報表使用者所作出的經濟決定，則會被視作重大錯誤陳述。
mt_raw: My objective is to obtain reasonable assurance that the financial statements as a whole do not contain any material misstatements resulting from fraud or error, and to issue an auditor's report that includes my opinion. Reasonable assurance is a high level of assurance, but it does not guarantee that an audit conducted in accordance with the audit standards of the audit office will necessarily detect any material misstatements that may exist. A misstatement may be caused by fraud or error, and it will be considered a material misstatement if it is reasonably expected that it, individually or in aggregate, could influence the economic decisions made by users of the financial statements.

terms: {'審計憑證': 'audit evidence', '財務報表': 'financial statements'}
src_raw:
- 識別和評估因欺詐或錯誤而導致財務報表存有重大錯誤陳述的風險；設計及執行審計程序以應對這些風險；以及取得充足和適當的審計憑證，作為我意見的基礎。由於欺詐可能涉及串謀、偽造、蓄意遺漏、虛假陳述，或凌駕內部控制的情況，因此未能發現因欺詐而導致重大錯誤陳述的風險，較未能發現因錯誤而導致者為高；
- 了解與審計相關的內部控制，以設計適當的審計程序。然而，此舉並非旨在對集團內部控制的有效性發表意見；
- 評價金融管理專員所採用的會計政策是否恰當，以及其作出的會計估計和相關資料披露是否合理；
- 判定金融管理專員以持續經營作為會計基礎的做法是否恰當，並根據所得的審計憑證，判定是否存在與事件或情況有關，而且可能對集團持續經營的能力構成重大疑慮的重大不確定性。如果我認為存在重大不確定性，則有必要在審計師報告中請使用者留意財務報表中的相關資料披露。假若所披露的相關資料不足，我便須發出非無保留意見的審計師報告。我的結論是基於截至審計師報告日止所取得的審計憑證。然而，未來事件或情況可能導致集團不能繼續持續經營；
- 評價財務報表的整體列報方式、結構和內容，包括披露資料，以及財務報表是否中肯反映交易和事項；及
- 就集團中實體或業務活動的財務資料獲取充足和適當的審計憑證，以對財務報表發表意見。我負責指導、監督和執行集團審計。我對我的審計意見承擔全部責任。
